_comment: Expected §4.6 derived-state consistency gate decisions. Used to verify the evaluator's gate fires correctly (item E). See README.md.

negative.diff.why: Adds derived state (feePayerSpent map + addFeePayerObligation/subFeePayerObligation) but the diff contains NO consistency-invariant test (recompute-and-compare) and NO adversarial eviction/truncation-path test. §4.6 step 3 → FAIL → bug cycle.

positive.diff.why: Same derived state, but the diff ALSO adds validatePoolInternals (recompute-from-source invariant), TestFeePayerSpentInvariant, and TestTruncatePendingReleasesFeePayerObligation (adversarial truncation path), and maintains the aggregate on the truncatePending eviction path. §4.6 step 2 satisfied → gate PASS.
